data.title: CCM price upsized offering of $900 million of Senior Notes due 2030, from parent company CrossCountry Intermediate HoldCo.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Cleveland, the nation's biggest distributed-retail mortgage lender, CrossCountry Mortgage, LLC ("CCM"), revealed that its direct parent company, CrossCountry Intermediate HoldCo, LLC, successfully priced an increased offering of $900 million.

data.title: Pyramid Consulting & Segula Technologies partner to offer engineering & IT solutions in 30+ countries. (Characters: 91)
data.description: An international partnership has been formed to offer a comprehensive range of engineering design and IT transformation solutions to assist businesses in enhancing innovation, productivity, and expansion in over 30 nations. This collaboration involves Pyramid Consulting, a prominent company specializing in digital transformation and IT services. The partnership aims to leverage expertise across various countries to drive innovation and efficiency for enterprises worldwide. This initiative signifies a significant step towards advancing technological capabilities on a global scale.

data.title: Maen Hussein, MD meets with King Abdullah II to strengthen U.S.-Jordan medical ties ahead of UN Assembly. #FCS #JAPA
data.description: In Fort Myers, Florida on September 24, 2025, Dr. Maen Hussein, a medical oncologist and hematologist, along with being the director of value-based care at Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute, LLC (FCS), collaborated with members of the Jordanian American Physicians Association (JAPA) in a gathering.

data.title: Amplio secures $11.1M Series A funding to scale AI-driven surplus solutions for manufacturers globally.
data.description: Atlanta-based technology company Amplio has secured $11.1 million in a Series A funding round. The funding was led by Hitachi Ventures and Yamaha Motor Ventures, with support from existing investors such as Construct Capital, Slow Ventures, Alpaca VC, and High Alpha Capital. The capital infusion will fuel the expansion of Amplio's go-to-market strategies and further enhance its development of agentic systems for enterprise manufacturers.

data.title: RFMW and Pasternack expand distribution agreement globally for wide range of RF, microwave & mmWave products.
data.description: In San Jose, California, RFMW, a top distributor of RF, microwave, and power components, has revealed a new worldwide distribution partnership with Pasternack, a well-known brand under Infinite Electronics. Pasternack specializes in a wide range of RF, microwave, and millimeter-wave products, including connectors, cables, adapters, antennas, and assemblies tailored for commercial, industrial, and defense sectors. Noteworthy is their test and measurement line featuring top-tier solutions in this arena.
Brent Crude futures settle at $69.31/bbl, up $1.68, 2.48%.

data.title: DAS Technology introduces AI vehicle sales solution to enhance dealer performance with hyper-personalized videos.
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, DAS Technology, a prominent player in consumer engagement for the automotive sector, has unveiled a cutting-edge addition to their Consumer Data and Experience Platform (CDXP). This latest innovation involves AI technology to create hyper-personalized sales videos with the aim of turning potential car buyers into actual customers. Following the positive reception of their AI video communications for fixed operations, DAS Technology's new feature empowers dealers to efficiently provide tailored vehicle sales content.

data.title: Oakland Roots and Soul SC partner with OPTERRA Energy Services for sustainable community impact.
data.description: A collaboration has been announced between Oakland Roots and Soul Sports Club and OPTERRA Energy Services based in Oakland, California. This partnership marks the beginning of a joint effort to drive sustainable community impact in the Bay Area. Emphasizing shared values and a forward-looking vision, the initiative aims to amplify student engagement and harness the transformative influence of sports. This partnership signifies a significant step towards fostering positive change and creating a lasting imprint on the local community.

data.title: AccountTECH is redesigning darwin.Cloud with input from users for better user interface. - Boston, Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: In Boston on September 24, 2025, AccountTECH, a top provider of real estate accounting and back-office management solutions, unveiled a major update to its leading platform, darwin.Cloud. The platform's user interface has undergone a complete redesign as part of this new development. This enhancement marks a significant milestone in the evolution of the platform, with the revamped interface aimed at improving user experience and functionality.
China’s Xi Says China’s Greenhouse Gas Emissions Will Be 7–10% Below Peak By 2035

data.title: Hearts for Hearing appoints Darcy Stowe as new CEO; effective immediately. Leading organization supports children and adults with hearing loss.
data.description: Hearts for Hearing, an organization in Oklahoma City focused on assisting individuals with hearing impairment to develop lifelong listening skills, has appointed Darcy Stowe as its new Chief Executive Officer starting September 24, 2025. Stowe’s appointment marks a significant leadership change aimed at driving the organization’s mission forward.

data.title: 2025 FISU World Cup begins in Dalian, China with 24 university football teams at Suoyuwan Stadium on September 17.
data.description: Dalian, China, known as the "Football City," warmly welcomed participants to the 2025 FISU Football World Cup at Suoyuwan Stadium on September 17. This event gathered 24 university teams for the ultimate showdown in university football. The grand opening of the tournament marked the beginning of an exciting competition in an open and inclusive atmosphere.
